identity.name: Sow & Reap Journal
identity.description: A digital companion for the church planter in Palawan. Focusing on spiritual depth, relational breadth, and financial integrity.
identity.target_audience: Church Planter (29yo), Mobile-heavy user, Puerto Princesa context

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Scripture references

body.usage: General text, Form inputs, List items

primary.description: Philippine Forest Green - Used for Primary Actions, Active States, Headers

secondary.description: Golden Mango - Used for Highlights, 'Praises', Important Alerts

background.description: Warm Rice Paper - Avoid pure #FFFFFF for main backgrounds. Use soft cream.

surface.description: Clean white for cards to create contrast against cream background.

navigation.type: Bottom Tab Bar (Mobile), Sidebar (Desktop - optional but focus on mobile feel)

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100/50 overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 rounded-full px-8 font-serif tracking-wide shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 h-12 rounded-full px-6 hover:bg-stone-200 font-sans

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-stone-200 focus:border-primary px-0 py-3 rounded-none placeholder:text-stone-400 focus:ring-0 transition-colors
inputs.label_style: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-500 font-bold mb-1

journal_entry.textarea: w-full min-h-[150px] bg-[linear-gradient(transparent_27px,#E5E7EB_28px)] bg-[length:100%_28px] leading-[28px] border-none focus:ring-0 text-lg font-serif text-stone-800 resize-none p-0

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
textures.usage: Overlay on solid backgrounds to give paper feel

images.description: Tranquil body of water with lush trees. Use for Dashboard header background.
Minimalist white journal. Use for Empty States or Journal Landing.
Lush green field. Use for 'People Tracker' or 'Growth' sections.

people_tracker.indicators: Color coded badges for 'Next Step' urgency

budget_ledger.color_logic: Green = Safe, Yellow = Warning (>75%), Red = Over Budget

rules: Text on Primary Green must be White.
Text on Background must be Dark Grey (#1C1917).

setup: Configure 'tailwind.config.js' with the 'palette' colors provided above.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (Save success, Budget warnings).

specific_files.tailwind_config: Extend the theme with 'forest', 'sand', and 'paper' colors.
specific_files.global_css: Add the noise texture to the body background.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Playfair Display'.
Do NOT use standard gray borders. Use 'stone-100' or warm greys.
Do NOT center text by default. Use left align for readability.
Add 'data-testid' to all inputs and buttons.
Ensure the app works OFFLINE (handle empty states gracefully).
